signals.npcLine: Datastreams warn: market pulse sinking sharply. Guards on high alert.
signals.questPulse: Locate the source of sudden market chill within neon alleys.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto tides fall; shadow net whispers of collapse and fear.
signals.clueEvent: Trace the signal that plunged the digital economy in chaos.

signals.npcLine: Whispers: RAVE and SIREN tokens flicker then fade in dark webs.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt hidden code behind fading town's favorite cryptos.
signals.worldFeed: Patterns emerge where fringe tokens drop into silence.
signals.clueEvent: Uncover why once-rising tokens now ghost the trade grids.

signals.npcLine: Old netrats mumble: BTC's pulse weakens, shadows creep deeper.
signals.questPulse: Gather intel on BTC's elusive drift from core systems.
signals.worldFeed: Echoes of ancient cryptos lost in digital dust storms.
signals.clueEvent: Find the cryptic node behind BTC’s wavering signal.

signals.npcLine: Markets glitch; low trust saps the cybernet like poison fog.
signals.questPulse: Monitor market feeds for unstable sectors ripe for exploitation.
signals.worldFeed: Fear dominates trade zones; shadows exploit the uncertain.
signals.clueEvent: Map hotspots of shifting trust amid cyber-economic chaos.

signals.npcLine: REQ and MON tokens flicker; maybe ripe for quick ops.
signals.questPulse: Coordinate discreet runs to capitalize on volatile token shifts.
signals.worldFeed: Fragments of upcoming moves detected in minor token flux.
signals.clueEvent: Plan insertion points as digital assets tremble in heat.
